commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Copilot manual compaction through the SDK session-history RPC, stores stricter Copilot session bindings in plugin state, forwards auth identity into CLI/gateway/chat compaction callers, removes marker sidecars, and detaches Matrix async event handlers.

PR surface: Source +243, Tests +589, Docs +3. Total +835 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: after a harness restart, compact() returns missing_thread_binding without deleting the stored Copilot binding, while host recovery treats that reason as fallback-safe. I did not run a live Copilot session, so this is source-reproducible rather than fully reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected maintainer handling, merge conflicts, missing real proof, and compatibility/security-boundary decisions make this a human review item rather than a safe automation lane.
